issues.title: Older release branches point to nightly images that disappear
issues.body: We have nightly bumping via knobots into `main` branches of various repos. I'm noticing really old brances that are close to EOL their nightly images are being deleted and thus CI is stuck in those repositories.

issues.title: Prow's peribolos jobs are failing with HTTP 429 too many requests

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.title: codecov seems broken

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.body:
I've contacted codecov support - I sent the following email

We're using codecov in the Knative OSS project and the %'s are being reported incorrectly it seems and it's failing PRs that previously didn't fail.

eg.

[https://app.codecov.io/gh/knative-extensions/net-istio](https://us-28010.email-composer-webhooks.gong.io/email-tracking/clicked?email-info-token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJjb21wYW55SWQiOiIxMzQzODcxODMwMTYxMDA5ODY4IiwiZHJhZnRJZCI6IjIzMjMwMDEzNjcyNjE1NjI0NyIsImxpbmtVcmwiOiJodHRwczovL2FwcC5jb2RlY292LmlvL2doL2tuYXRpdmUtZXh0ZW5zaW9ucy9uZXQtaXN0aW8iLCJsaW5rVGV4dCI6IiIsInRlbXBsYXRlSWQiOiIiLCJleHAiOjE3NDYyMTQ4MDUsImlhdCI6MTc0NDQwMDQwNSwianRpIjoiVXUrUE50alZuNUVIIn0.FDtp9GJFoAeqBwnNl0YGEVxStcdUxeYgNeGM7XHTnjE)

coverage here shows 81%

but then a coverage run shows 72% for some reason
[https://github.com/knative-extensions/net-istio/pull/1419/checks?check_run_id=40365762906](https://us-28010.email-composer-webhooks.gong.io/email-tracking/clicked?email-info-token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7oDbzvIOaoHbfIqSlEvm-91f_iEttGlxIkC4m89pvkg)

issues.title: Python virtual env to use in GH actions

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.body:
Let's open an issue to properly investigate this for all python deps? Options are:
- use `break-system-packages` flag as a workaround
- use virtual env
- use system package manager or pipx

_Originally posted by @skonto in https://github.com/knative/community/pull/1620#discussion_r1795357143_


The issues popped up in knative/community Peribolos check, but we have a couple more of places that uses Python tools. That can have the same symptoms. 

Related to GH runner update of python package: https://github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/8615

issues.title: Run tests on GKE spot instances

labels.name: help wanted
labels.description: Extra attention is needed

labels.name: lifecycle/stale
labels.description: Denotes an issue or PR has remained open with no activity and has become stale.

issues.body:
GKE provides, so-called [spot instances](https://cloud.google.com/spot-vms). The main benefit, of using them, is a massive cost savings. The [GKE with Spot instances doc](https://cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs/concepts/spot-vms) describes how to use them.

Although, it would be a good idea to run tests on those nodes, some changes are probably needed in Knative:

- [ ] ensure the tests could survive node termination
- [ ] reconfigure test clusters to use more, but smaller nodes

issues.title: serving nightly job can't read pod logs

labels.name: lifecycle/frozen
labels.description: Indicates that an issue or PR should not be auto-closed due to staleness.

issues.body:
https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C04LY4M2G49/p1695648014931569

I'm seeing this in the nightly builds
```
time="2023-09-24T09:41:34Z" level=error msg="client list: listing pods in : pods is forbidden: User \"system:serviceaccount:test-pods:nightly\" cannot list resource \"pods\" in API group \"\" at the cluster scope" cmp=lister
time="2023-09-24T09:41:34Z" level=error msg="lister error: client list: listing pods in : pods is forbidden: User \"system:serviceaccount:test-pods:nightly\" cannot list resource \"pods\" in API group \"\" at the cluster scope" cmp=controller
kail: error: Unable to initialize data source
```

pullRequests.title: Increase timeout for EKB channel-integration tests
pullRequests.body: In EKB the channel-integration tests take a bit longer recently and so hit the default 2h timeout more often. So increasing it for now.

pullRequests.title: Remove Prow configs for archived repositories
pullRequests.body:
These repositories have been archived and no longer need CI jobs:
- https://github.com/knative/client-pkg
- https://github.com/knative-extensions/eventing-kogito
- https://github.com/knative-extensions/kn-plugin-diag
- https://github.com/knative-extensions/kn-plugin-migration

### Changes
- Delete source job configs from jobs_config/
- Delete generated job files from jobs/generated/
- Run ./hack/generate-configs.sh to remove testgrid dashboard entries

<!--
  Use `Fixes #<issue number>`, or `Fixes (paste link of issue)`
  to automatically close linked issue when the PR is merged.
-->

fyi @creydr

pullRequests.title: Add WG leads to override plugin config
pullRequests.body:
**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Fixes https://github.com/knative/community/issues/1570 Per the discussion in the above issue, we can allow at least WG leads to override Prow. That should cover various cases of flake checks and should be used with caution. #### Changes - Add WG leads to override plugin config /cc @knative/eventing-wg-leads @knative/functions-wg-leads @knative/serving-wg-leads /cc @dprotaso @upodroid @cardil
